title: Opening for Category Manager at HomeLane Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at HomeLane Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HomeLane Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About HomeLane Ventures Solutions:
HomeLane Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane Ventures Solutions!
